Was: origin/main's already-merged PR #73 (astro 5.18.2 -> 6.4.6) was incompatible with the pinned @astrojs/cloudflare@^12.5.5 and @astrojs/tailwind (no astro 6 support at all), breaking both `npm ci` on the GitHub Actions runners and Cloudflare's own native Workers Build.
